TR. 676(aT) iceti96 30-7-1990 MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi. the 11th August, 2000 G.S.R. 661(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 5 of the President's Emoluments and Pension Act, 1951, (30 of 1951), the Central Government hereby makes the following 'rules further to amend the President's Pension Rules, 1962, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the President's Pension (Amendment) Rules, 2000. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In rule 3 of the President's Pension Rules, 1962, in sub-rule (1) after the proviso to clause (g), the following clauses shall be inserted, namely :— "(h) In the event of the death of a President in harness or after demitting office, the surviving spouse shall be entitled, without payment of licence fee, to the use of unfurnished residence anywhere in India at the choice of the spouse for the remainder of his or her life : provided the spouse shall, be liable to pay water and electricity charges. (i) At places where Government owned accommodation is allotted to the spouse, the elss of accommodation shall be Type VII and if the highest type of Government owned accommodation available at a particular place is smaller in size, the highest type of accommodation available at the place shall be allotted to the spouse. (j) At places where suitable Government accommodation is not available for allotment to the surviving spouse, the size of the accommodation to be taken on lease to be provided for the surviving spouse shall have a living area not exceeding 2000 square feet. Residential accommodation shall be allotted to the surviving spouse at a place indicated by him or her, if he or she does not own any accommodation in that particular place. (1) The accommodation allotted to the surviving spouse shall be for the exclusive use of the spouse and the same shall not be transferred to any other person after the death of the surviving spouse. (rn) The Directorate of Estates shall be responsible for arranging accommodation for the surviving spouse. [F. No. 1/1/97-M&G] R. K. SINGH, It. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide G. S.R. No. 1328 dated 1st October, 1962 and subsequently amended vide : (1) Notification No. I3/1/67-Pub. I dated 29-8-1967. (2) Notification No. 13/6/68-Pub. I dated 9-10-1968. (3) Notification No. 13/6/68-Pub. I dated 8-1-1969. (4) Notification No. 1/3/76-States dated 28-2-1977. (5) G.S.R. 613(E) dated 9-4-1986. (6) G. S R. 676(E) dated 30-7-1990. Printed by the Manager. Govt. of ladia Press. Ring Road. May apuri.N ew Delhi- 110044 and Published by the Controller u1 Pubbeauuns. Delhr1100i4. (k) -- 2 of 2 --
